1F15:0491.label: dma_test_channel
1F15:0491.comment:
Per-channel register retention test. Arg: channel number (0-7).
[bp-0x0a]=error flag, [bp-0x0c]=pattern counter, [bp-0x04]=pattern index,
[bp-0x10]=saved address, [bp-0x08]=saved count,
[bp-0x0e]=new address pattern, [bp-0x06]=new count pattern.
Outer loop: 0x78 iterations. Inner loop: 0x64 delay cycles.

1F15:0626.label: dma_clear_flipflop
1F15:0626.comment:
Clear DMA byte flip-flop. Arg: channel number.
Writes 0xFF to port 0x0C (DMA1, ch<4) or 0xD8 (DMA2, ch>=4).

1F15:064A.label: dma_read_address
1F15:064A.comment:
Read 16-bit address from DMA channel. Arg: channel number.
Clears flip-flop, reads low byte then high byte from port table at 0x585e.
Returns AX = (high<<8)|low.

1F15:068B.label: dma_read_count
1F15:068B.comment:
Read 16-bit count from DMA channel. Arg: channel number.
Clears flip-flop, reads low byte then high byte from port table at 0x586e.
Returns AX = (high<<8)|low.

1F15:06CC.label: dma_write_address
1F15:06CC.comment:
Write 16-bit address to DMA channel. Args: channel, value.
Clears flip-flop, writes low byte then high byte to port table at 0x585e.

1F15:0709.label: dma_write_count
1F15:0709.comment:
Write 16-bit count to DMA channel. Args: channel, value.
Clears flip-flop, writes low byte then high byte to port table at 0x586e.

36C5:06EE.label: port_write
36C5:06EE.comment: out dx, al — writes AL to port DX. Args: port, value.

36C5:0744.label: cli_wrapper
36C5:0744.comment: cli; retf — disables interrupts before each test iteration.

36C5:0A22.label: port_read
36C5:0A22.comment: in al, dx — reads byte from port DX. Arg: port. Returns AX (AH=0).

1582:1197.label: delay_read
1582:1197.comment: Delay loop (0x28 iterations) then call port_read. Arg: port. Returns AX.

1582:11BC.label: delay_write
1582:11BC.comment: Delay loop (0x28 iterations) then call port_write. Args: port, value.

1F15:0578.label: set_error_write_readback
1F15:0578.comment: Address mismatch after writing new pattern. Sets [bp-0x0a]=0xFFFF.

1F15:057D.label: restore_phase
1F15:057D.comment: Begin restore: write original address and count back.

1F15:05B5.label: set_error_restore_readback
1F15:05B5.comment: Address mismatch after restoring original value. Sets [bp-0x0a]=0xFFFF.

1F15:05BA.label: end_of_iteration
1F15:05BA.comment: End of one outer iteration: call cli_wrapper, reset inner delay counter, loop.

lineComments.1F15:04B9 83 7E F6 00: check error flag — non-zero means early exit
lineComments.1F15:0564 3B 46 F2: compare read-back address with written pattern
lineComments.1F15:0573 3B 46 FA: compare read-back count with written pattern
lineComments.1F15:05A1 3B 46 F0: compare restored address with original saved value
lineComments.1F15:05B0 3B 46 F8: compare restored count with original saved value
lineComments.1F15:01BD 26 83 3E 98 01 01: machine type 1 (IBM PC) — skip ch0 test
lineComments.1F15:01C5 26 83 3E 98 01 02: machine type 2 (IBM XT) — skip ch0 test
lineComments.1F15:01D5 26 83 3E 98 01 04: machine type 4 (IBM AT) — skip ch0 test
lineComments.1F15:01ED 26 83 3E A0 01 00: if [0x01a0]==0, skip ch0 test; 286 has [0x01a0]=1 so ch0 IS tested
